SEARCH

Uses of Enum Class
common.dto.VisitType

Packages that use VisitType
Package
Description
client.service
Client service layer: a typed facade over the raw connection.
client.view
Client JavaFX controllers and view helpers — one controller per FXML screen (login, dashboard, reservations, gate, reports, approval queue, notifications, registration, …) plus shared UI utilities such as BaseController and Widgets.
common.dto
Serializable data transfer objects and enums shared by client and server.
server.control
Server business logic: the controllers and services that implement GoNature's use cases.
server.dao
Data access layer: one DAO per aggregate (auth, members, parks, reservations, visits, waiting list, notifications, reports, parameter-change requests).

  • Uses of VisitType in client.service

    Methods in client.service with parameters of type VisitType
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    NetworkService.casualVisit(int partySize, VisitType visitType, Long visitorId)
    Records a casual walk-in at the employee's park (PARK_EMPLOYEE only).
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    NetworkService.createReservation(int parkId, long visitorId, String visitDate, String visitTime, int partySize, VisitType visitType, Long guideId, boolean paidInAdvance, String email, String phone)
    Creates a reservation.
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    NetworkService.joinWaitlist(int parkId, long visitorId, String visitDate, String visitTime, int partySize, VisitType visitType, Long guideId, boolean paidInAdvance, String email, String phone)
    Joins the waiting list for a full park/date — same inputs as a booking.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private void
    ReservationCreateController.promptJoinWaitlist(int parkId, long visitorId, String visitDate, String visitTime, int partySize, VisitType visitType, Long guideId, boolean paidInAdvance, String email, String phone)
    Asks the visitor whether to join the waiting list after a park-full rejection.

    int
    VisitDAO.insertVisit(Integer reservationId, int parkId, Long visitorId, int headcount, VisitType visitType, Integer priceCents)
